name: Red Bell Pepper Burritos
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups kidney beans, canned, drained, rinsed and mashed
1/2 cup Monterey Jack cheese, shredded, lowfat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add onions and garlic; cook until soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Add peppers and cook until almost tender, 5 to 10 minutes.
4. Stir in beans, chili peppers, cumin, and oregano. Cook through.
5. Place a tortilla in the skillet over moderate heat and cook until pliable, turning frequently.
6. Spread about 4 tablespoons of filling down the center of each tortilla.
7. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon of cheese, then roll up, seam side down.
8. Repeat with remaining tortillas.
9. Wrap burritos tightly in foil and place them in a baking dish.
10. Bake at 325°F for 15 minutes.
11. Serve with salsa, hot-pepper sauce, sour cream, chopped tomatoes, and shredded lettuce.
Serves 4
